name: graphnosis-app
description: Personal second-memory desktop app powered by Graphnosis. Local-first, encrypted, multi-graph, attaches relevant subgraph context to any MCP-aware AI.
author: Nehloo Interactive LLC

pnpm._comment_overrides: Local override active: @nehloo/graphnosis points to the local clone while serializeSubgraph export is pre-release (added to SDK main, not yet published). Remove override and bump the version pin in apps/desktop-sidecar/package.json once v0.5.3+ is published to npm.
pnpm._comment_packageExtensions: libsodium-wrappers-sumo@0.7.16 ships a broken ESM entry (relative import to ./libsodium-sumo.mjs that the package doesn't include in its files array). Force its `.` export to point to the CJS file in ALL conditions so bundlers (Bun --compile, Vite, etc.) never pick the broken .mjs. Without this, `bun build --compile` of the sidecar fails with 'Could not resolve ./libsodium-sumo.mjs'.
